results.snippet: Learn how to use Make.io's JSON modules to parse, create, and aggregate JSON data in your scenarios.
A video tutorial on how to parse JSON data and use it in your Make.io automations.

results.source_title: How to create a document from parsed JSON in Make.io
results.snippet: Step-by-step guide on how to create a Google Docs document using data from a parsed JSON file in Make.io.
